mapper.sql: select g.group_id, g.user_id, u.nickname, g.venue_id, g.spot_id, s.spot_name, g.title, g.fishing_date, g.time_slot, g.max_members, g.current_count, g.description, g.status, g.create_time from fish_group_fishing g left join fish_user u on u.user_id = g.user_id left join fish_spot s on s.spot_id = g.spot_id
mapper.select: where g.status in (0, 1) AND g.venue_id = #{venueId} order by g.fishing_date asc, g.create_time desc limit 50
where g.group_id in (select gm.group_id from fish_group_member gm where gm.user_id = #{userId} and gm.status = 0) order by g.fishing_date desc limit 30
mapper.insert: insert into fish_group_fishing (user_id, venue_id, spot_id, title, fishing_date, time_slot, max_members, current_count, description, status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{venueId}, #{spotId}, #{title}, #{fishingDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{maxMembers}, #{currentCount}, #{description}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_group_fishing set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId}
update fish_group_fishing set current_count = current_count + 1, update_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId}
update fish_group_fishing set current_count = greatest(current_count - 1, 1), update_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.select: select m.id, m.group_id, m.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, m.role, m.status, m.join_time from fish_group_member m left join fish_user u on u.user_id = m.user_id where m.group_id = #{groupId} and m.status = 0 order by m.join_time asc
select * from fish_group_member where group_id = #{groupId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into fish_group_member (group_id, user_id, role, status, join_time) values (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, 0, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_group_member set status = #{status}, quit_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId} and user_id = #{userId}
